mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reminder (event_id, user_id, offset_minutes, fire_time, sent, create_time) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{userId}, #{offsetMinutes}, #{fireTime}, #{sent}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, user_id, offset_minutes, fire_time, sent, create_time FROM reminder WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY fire_time ASC

SELECT r.id, r.event_id AS eventId, e.title AS eventTitle, e.start_time AS startTime, e.end_time AS endTime, r.offset_minutes AS offsetMinutes, r.fire_time AS fireTime, r.sent AS sent FROM reminder r INNER JOIN `event` e ON r.event_id = e.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND e.status = 1 AND r.fire_time <= #{currentTime} AND e.end_time > #{currentTime} ORDER BY r.fire_time ASC
